name: Sync Mechanisms
description: Unified sync device, domain sync, status API, and dashboard integration. All systems that write data call record_domain_sync for consistent status across dashboards.
agent_prompt: Sync device: unified_points_sync_device. Use record_domain_sync(domain) when your system writes data. Domains: unified_points, users, profiles, aggregator, trophies, achievements, battle, shop, quests, leaderboards, analytics, compendium, generator, gallery, stats, social, agent_skillsets, agent_knowledge, game, paypal, login, onboarding, communication_psychology, dna, game_save, agent_activity, referral, notifications, auto_save, templates. State in DB (sync_state, sync_domain_state); audit in sync_audit; health in sync_health.
tech_spec: GET /api/sync/status, POST /api/sync/now. unified_points_sync_device.record_domain_sync(domain, count?, extra?). SYNC_DOMAINS in unified_points_sync.py.
user_guide: Sync status vises på dashboards (unified, profile, stats). Points, users, profiles, rulebooks, agents og knowledge er synkroniseret.
manual: Agent manual V16: When implementing a new feature that writes data, add record_domain_sync(domain) after successful write. Use domains from SYNC_DOMAINS. Sync status widget fetches /vidgenerator/api/sync/status.
documentation: Sync mechanisms ensure all important systems report their last sync time and optional counts. The Unified Points Sync Device (unified_points_sync.py) is the single source of truth. Every add_points call triggers record_points_activity. Domain-specific sync is recorded in: quests, achievements, compendium, social (chat), gallery, agent_knowledge, paypal, game (hunters), agent_skillsets, login, leaderboards, analytics, onboarding.
finish_lines: Unified Points Sync Device: backend/services/unified_points_sync.py. State in logs/unified_points_sync/sync_state.json.
record_domain_sync(domain, count?, extra?): Call after successful write. Domain must be in SYNC_DOMAINS.
record_points_activity(): Called automatically from add_points in unified_points_database and unified_points_database_enhanced.
GET /api/sync/status: Returns unified_points, users, profiles, domains, rulebooks, agent_skillsets, agent_knowledge.
POST /api/sync/now: Triggers sync_now(user_id?). Returns updated status. Dashboard Sync now button uses this.
Sync status widget: vidgenerator/static/js/sync-status-widget.js. Renders on unified_dashboard, profile, stats.

sync_domains.description: User count from DB or logs/user_profiles
Profile count from player_levels or user_profiles

rules.name: Unified Points Sync Device
rules.text: unified_points_sync_device in backend/services/unified_points_sync.py. get_canonical, register_award, sync_now, record_domain_sync, record_points_activity, get_sync_status.

rules.name: Domain Sync
rules.text: Call record_domain_sync(domain, count?, extra?) after successful write. Domain must be in SYNC_DOMAINS.

rules.name: Points Activity
rules.text: add_points in unified_points_database and unified_points_database_enhanced automatically calls record_points_activity.

rules.name: Sync Status API
rules.text: GET /api/sync/status and /vidgenerator/api/sync/status. Returns unified_points, users, profiles, domains, rulebooks, agent_skillsets, agent_knowledge.

rules.name: Sync Now API
rules.text: POST /api/sync/now and /vidgenerator/api/sync/now. Optional body: {user_id}. Triggers sync_now, returns updated status.

rules.name: Dashboard Widget
rules.text: sync-status-widget.js fetches status and renders Points, Users, Profiles, Rulebooks, Agents, Knowledge. Sync now button triggers POST sync/now.
